scope_note: This panel summarizes the structured course-rigor and application-guidance notes currently exported for this school. It remains source-backed and does not infer missing requirements.

areas.name: Course rigor
areas.summary: The cited Yale admissions pages do not provide a single minimum course-rigor formula.
areas.detail: The cited Yale admissions pages do not provide a single minimum course-rigor formula.

areas.name: Recommendations
areas.summary: Yale requires letters of recommendation from two teachers and one counselor, plus a school report with transcript.
areas.detail: Yale requires letters of recommendation from two teachers and one counselor, plus a school report with transcript.

areas.name: Essays
areas.summary: Yale requires Yale-specific short essays for first-year applicants.
areas.detail: Yale requires Yale-specific short essays for first-year applicants.
